name: Move-In Inspection
description: Leasing coordinates the move-in condition baseline, resident review, and closeout handoff with photos, countersign evidence, and approval gates before any resident send or PMS write.

stages.name: Confirm Inspection Readiness
stages.description: Confirm move-in facts, possession timing, and baseline inputs before resident-facing action.

steps.title: Normalize move-in inspection facts
steps.instructions: Normalize applicant/resident, property, unit, lease start, move-in date, possession status, key handoff state, prior make-ready completion, pre-existing condition notes, photo packet availability, and missing facts. Unknown completion, possession, or evidence fields must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize move-in inspection inputs and missing-data flags. No resident sends and no AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Confirm baseline prerequisites
steps.instructions: Confirm make-ready signoff, key status, utility readiness if available, known pre-existing defects, and whether a field inspection or resident self-inspection packet is required. Do not schedule, message, or write to external systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Confirm baseline prerequisites for move-in inspection. No external sends and no system writes.

stages.name: Assemble Baseline Evidence
stages.description: Prepare the move-in condition baseline and missing-evidence review.

steps.title: Assemble condition baseline
steps.instructions: Assemble room-by-room condition baseline, photos, videos, make-ready notes, appliance condition, keys/remotes inventory, meter/utility caveats if available, and pre-existing issue list. Do not fabricate condition data; missing photos or uncertain rooms remain needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Assemble condition baseline and evidence gaps. No resident sends and no AppFolio writes.

steps.title: Review condition baseline
steps.instructions: Review the baseline evidence for completeness and fairness before any resident-facing inspection packet, countersign request, or PMS note is prepared.
steps.human_prompt: Review move-in condition baseline before resident packet or PMS update.

stages.name: Resident Review Packet
stages.description: Draft resident review and countersign materials without sending them.

steps.title: Draft resident inspection packet
steps.instructions: Draft the resident-facing move-in inspection packet, deadline, countersign instructions, missing-item request, and internal notes. Draft-only; do not send to resident, update portal, or write to AppFolio.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft resident inspection packet and countersign request only. No external sends or system writes.

steps.title: Approve resident inspection send
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, or hold before any resident inspection packet, countersign request, reminder, portal update, or AppFolio note is sent or written.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before sending move-in inspection packet or writing inspection notes.

stages.name: Closeout Handoff
stages.description: Stage approved baseline and follow-up metadata for operator release.

steps.title: Stage approved baseline package
steps.instructions: Stage approved resident packet, countersign tracking fields, condition evidence refs, unresolved needs_verification items, and AppFolio note draft for operator release. Do not send, post, or write to external systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved move-in inspection package for human release. No resident sends and no system writes.

steps.title: Record move-in inspection closeout
steps.instructions: Record baseline packet status, approval source, evidence refs, countersign due date if known, unresolved gaps, and next owner. Internal audit only; no resident sends and no PMS writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Record internal move-in inspection closeout and next owner. No external sends or system writes.
